events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes equipment bonding work that is in-progress. Pre-task photos show guards, access control, and crew protection in place. Daily briefing form is signed. No active exposure visible. Reference materials: NEC 250.104 (bonding of piping and exposed structural steel) and 250.30 (grounding separately derived systems).

The scenario doesn't describe any actual defects or hazards. The work appears to be properly set up with safety measures in place. There's no evidence of non-compliance or unsafe conditions described. The task says to spot unsafe conditions, but none are described.

Since no hazards or defects are evident from the description, and the safety controls are in place, this would be a pass. The work is in-progress, safety measures are in place, briefing signed, no active exposure.
